name: Lark (Larksuite)
api_notes: Lark provides extensive REST APIs for core features including Messenger, Calendar, Docs, Tasks, and organizational management, supported by official SDKs.
one_liner: Lark is a comprehensive collaboration and productivity suite that offers an open platform for developers to integrate their business systems and build custom internal or public applications.
mcp_notes: No official or well-known community Model Context Protocol (MCP) server was identified in the provided documentation.

evidence.claim: Developers can access the Lark Open Platform to create and develop apps using their Lark organization account.
The Lark API uses Bearer token authentication.
Lark provides broad integration capabilities for enterprise applications, including Messenger, Docs, Calendar, and more.
Official SDKs are available for Node.js and other languages to facilitate API calls.

auth_notes: Uses Bearer token authentication with tenant_access_token or user_access_token. SDKs abstract the token management process.
access_notes: Developers can access the Lark Open Platform and create apps in the developer console using their organization account. While ISV (Independent Software Vendor) status for publishing to the Marketplace requires a review process, internal/custom app development is self-serve.
